title: rubus × tomentaceus
intro: Rubus × tomentaceus, also known as Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Black Raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus. It is characterized by its dark green, thorny canes and edible fruits, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant's leaves, roots, and fruits contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Rubus × tomentaceus is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
